videoJson.name: DVCPRO
videoJson.fact1: DVCPRO50, introduced  in 1997, used two DV codecs in parallel, doubling the data rate over the original DVCPRO to 50 Mbps
videoJson.fact2: Unlike baseline DV, DVCPRO uses locked audio, meaning the audio sample clock runs in sync with the video sample clock
videoJson.fact3: DVCPRO cassettes were about  the same size as Video8, Hi8, & Digital8 cassettes
